item.title: sudo for High Sierra [Security]
item.itunes:title: sudo for High Sierra [Security]
item.itunes:author: Markospoko
item.itunes:summary:
sudo for High Sierra
(Security)
sudo version 1.9.16 for High Sierra
I compiled sudo for Mac's High Sierra with newer clang (I need to sometimes also use High Sierra but I found only sudo for Catalina+), it should offer ya recent security, it comes from available sources
It's safe from my side folks

packages here:
- sudo-1.9.*.pkg - that has the sudo command
- sudo-logsrvd-1.9.*.pkg - log server that accepts event and I/O logs from sudo

*CAREFUL*: installing sudo via this pkg overwrites /usr/bin/sudo, make a backup if you want to keep your sudo but remember that as long as you have old version, it could be a way of undesirable acts in OS because of its flaws
[read more]
item.description:
sudo for High Sierra
(Security)
sudo version 1.9.16 for High Sierra
I compiled sudo for Mac's High Sierra with newer clang (I need to sometimes also use High Sierra but I found only sudo for Catalina+), it should offer ya recent security, it comes from available sources
It's safe from my side folks

packages here:
- sudo-1.9.*.pkg - that has the sudo command
- sudo-logsrvd-1.9.*.pkg - log server that accepts event and I/O logs from sudo

*CAREFUL*: installing sudo via this pkg overwrites /usr/bin/sudo, make a backup if you want to keep your sudo but remember that as long as you have old version, it could be a way of undesirable acts in OS because of its flaws
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
sudo for High Sierra
(Security)
sudo version 1.9.16 for High Sierra
I compiled sudo for Mac's High Sierra with newer clang (I need to sometimes also use High Sierra but I found only sudo for Catalina+), it should offer ya recent security, it comes from available sources
It's safe from my side folks

packages here:
- sudo-1.9.*.pkg - that has the sudo command
- sudo-logsrvd-1.9.*.pkg - log server that accepts event and I/O logs from sudo

*CAREFUL*: installing sudo via this pkg overwrites /usr/bin/sudo, make a backup if you want to keep your sudo but remember that as long as you have old version, it could be a way of undesirable acts in OS because of its flaws
[read more]

Aspect
(Graphic Apps)
Photo organization application with support for peer-to-peer based synchronization across devices.

(Graphic Apps)
Photo organization application with support for peer-to-peer based synchronization across devices.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Aspect
(Graphic Apps)
Photo organization application with support for peer-to-peer based synchronization across devices.

[read more]

item.title: Gens/GS [Emulation]
item.itunes:title: Gens/GS [Emulation]
item.itunes:author: msmalik681
item.itunes:summary:
Gens/GS
(Emulation)
I am not the developer I just uploaded this. This is i386/x86/32bit so you may need to install 32bit libfuse2 for your newer distros that have moved to libfuse3. Gens/GS is a Sega Mega Drive emulator derived from Gens and maintained by GerbilSoft. It is based upon the Gens version 2.15.2 Linux source code. Project goals include clean source code, combined features from various forks of Gens, and improved platform portability.

[read more]
item.description:
Gens/GS
(Emulation)
I am not the developer I just uploaded this. This is i386/x86/32bit so you may need to install 32bit libfuse2 for your newer distros that have moved to libfuse3. Gens/GS is a Sega Mega Drive emulator derived from Gens and maintained by GerbilSoft. It is based upon the Gens version 2.15.2 Linux source code. Project goals include clean source code, combined features from various forks of Gens, and improved platform portability.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Gens/GS
(Emulation)
I am not the developer I just uploaded this. This is i386/x86/32bit so you may need to install 32bit libfuse2 for your newer distros that have moved to libfuse3. Gens/GS is a Sega Mega Drive emulator derived from Gens and maintained by GerbilSoft. It is based upon the Gens version 2.15.2 Linux source code. Project goals include clean source code, combined features from various forks of Gens, and improved platform portability.

[read more]

item.title: Qtractor [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: Qtractor [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
Qtractor
(Music Production)
Qtractor is an audio/MIDI multi-track sequencer application written in C++ with the Qt framework. Target platform is Linux, where the Jack Audio Connection Kit (JACK) for audio and the Advanced Linux Sound Architecture (ALSA) for MIDI are the main infrastructures to evolve as a fairly-featured Linux desktop audio workstation GUI, specially dedicated to the personal home-studio.
Features:

- Multi-track audio and MIDI sequencing and recording.
- Developed on the Qt C++ application and UI framework.
- Uses JACK for audio and ALSA sequencer for MIDI as multimedia infrastructures.
- Traditional multi-track tape recorder control paradigm.
- Audio file formats support: OGG (via libvorbis), MP3 (via libmad, playback only), WAV, FLAC, AIFF and many, many more (via libsndfile).
- Standard MIDI files support (format 0 and 1).
- Non-destructive, non-linear editing.
- Unlimited number of tracks per session/project.
- Unlimited number of overlapping clips per track.
- XML encoded session/project description files (SDI).
- Point-and-click, multi-select, drag-and-drop interaction (drag, move, drop, cut, copy, paste, paste-repeat, delete, split, merge).
- Unlimited undo/redo.
- Built-in mixer and monitor controls.
- Built-in connection patchbay control and persistence (a-la QjackCtl).
- LADSPA, DSSI, native VST(2), VST3, CLAP and LV2 plug-ins support.
- Unlimited number of plug-ins per track or bus.
- Plug-in presets, programs and chunk/configurations support, including native VST FXB/FXP file support.
- Unlimited audio/MIDI effect send/return inserts per track or bus.
- Loop-recording/takes.
- Audio/MIDI clip fade-in/out, cross-fade (linear, quadratic, cubic).
- Audio/MIDI clip gain/volume, normalize, export.
- Audio/MIDI track and plugin parameter automation (dynamic curves, sample&hold, linear and spline modes).
- Audio clip time-stretching (WSOLA-like or via librubberband),
pitch-shifting (via librubberband) and seamless sample-rate conversion (via libsamplerate).
- Audio/MIDI track export (mix-down, render, merge, freeze).
- Audio/MIDI metronome bar/beat clicks.
- Unlimited tempo/time-signature map.
- Unlimited location/bar markers.
- MIDI clip editor (matrix/piano roll).
- MIDI instrument definitions (a-la Cakewalk(tm) (*.ins)); SoundFont (*.sf2) and MIDI Names XML (*.midnam) files also supported.
- MIDI controller mapping/learn/assignment (mixer and plug-in parameters).
- MIDI system exclusive (SysEx) setups.
- JACK transport sync master/slave.
- JACK session support.
- NSM (Non/New Session Management) support.
- MMC control surface enabled.
- MIDI Clock, Song Position Pointer (SPP) support.
- Configurable PC-keyboard and MIDI controller shortcuts.
[read more]
item.description:
Qtractor
(Music Production)
Qtractor is an audio/MIDI multi-track sequencer application written in C++ with the Qt framework. Target platform is Linux, where the Jack Audio Connection Kit (JACK) for audio and the Advanced Linux Sound Architecture (ALSA) for MIDI are the main infrastructures to evolve as a fairly-featured Linux desktop audio workstation GUI, specially dedicated to the personal home-studio.
Features:

- Multi-track audio and MIDI sequencing and recording.
- Developed on the Qt C++ application and UI framework.
- Uses JACK for audio and ALSA sequencer for MIDI as multimedia infrastructures.
- Traditional multi-track tape recorder control paradigm.
- Audio file formats support: OGG (via libvorbis), MP3 (via libmad, playback only), WAV, FLAC, AIFF and many, many more (via libsndfile).
- Standard MIDI files support (format 0 and 1).
- Non-destructive, non-linear editing.
- Unlimited number of tracks per session/project.
- Unlimited number of overlapping clips per track.
- XML encoded session/project description files (SDI).
- Point-and-click, multi-select, drag-and-drop interaction (drag, move, drop, cut, copy, paste, paste-repeat, delete, split, merge).
- Unlimited undo/redo.
- Built-in mixer and monitor controls.
- Built-in connection patchbay control and persistence (a-la QjackCtl).
- LADSPA, DSSI, native VST(2), VST3, CLAP and LV2 plug-ins support.
- Unlimited number of plug-ins per track or bus.
- Plug-in presets, programs and chunk/configurations support, including native VST FXB/FXP file support.
- Unlimited audio/MIDI effect send/return inserts per track or bus.
- Loop-recording/takes.
- Audio/MIDI clip fade-in/out, cross-fade (linear, quadratic, cubic).
- Audio/MIDI clip gain/volume, normalize, export.
- Audio/MIDI track and plugin parameter automation (dynamic curves, sample&hold, linear and spline modes).
- Audio clip time-stretching (WSOLA-like or via librubberband),
pitch-shifting (via librubberband) and seamless sample-rate conversion (via libsamplerate).
- Audio/MIDI track export (mix-down, render, merge, freeze).
- Audio/MIDI metronome bar/beat clicks.
- Unlimited tempo/time-signature map.
- Unlimited location/bar markers.
- MIDI clip editor (matrix/piano roll).
- MIDI instrument definitions (a-la Cakewalk(tm) (*.ins)); SoundFont (*.sf2) and MIDI Names XML (*.midnam) files also supported.
- MIDI controller mapping/learn/assignment (mixer and plug-in parameters).
- MIDI system exclusive (SysEx) setups.
- JACK transport sync master/slave.
- JACK session support.
- NSM (Non/New Session Management) support.
- MMC control surface enabled.
- MIDI Clock, Song Position Pointer (SPP) support.
- Configurable PC-keyboard and MIDI controller shortcuts.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Qtractor
(Music Production)
Qtractor is an audio/MIDI multi-track sequencer application written in C++ with the Qt framework. Target platform is Linux, where the Jack Audio Connection Kit (JACK) for audio and the Advanced Linux Sound Architecture (ALSA) for MIDI are the main infrastructures to evolve as a fairly-featured Linux desktop audio workstation GUI, specially dedicated to the personal home-studio.
Features:

- Multi-track audio and MIDI sequencing and recording.
- Developed on the Qt C++ application and UI framework.
- Uses JACK for audio and ALSA sequencer for MIDI as multimedia infrastructures.
- Traditional multi-track tape recorder control paradigm.
- Audio file formats support: OGG (via libvorbis), MP3 (via libmad, playback only), WAV, FLAC, AIFF and many, many more (via libsndfile).
- Standard MIDI files support (format 0 and 1).
- Non-destructive, non-linear editing.
- Unlimited number of tracks per session/project.
- Unlimited number of overlapping clips per track.
- XML encoded session/project description files (SDI).
- Point-and-click, multi-select, drag-and-drop interaction (drag, move, drop, cut, copy, paste, paste-repeat, delete, split, merge).
- Unlimited undo/redo.
- Built-in mixer and monitor controls.
- Built-in connection patchbay control and persistence (a-la QjackCtl).
- LADSPA, DSSI, native VST(2), VST3, CLAP and LV2 plug-ins support.
- Unlimited number of plug-ins per track or bus.
- Plug-in presets, programs and chunk/configurations support, including native VST FXB/FXP file support.
- Unlimited audio/MIDI effect send/return inserts per track or bus.
- Loop-recording/takes.
- Audio/MIDI clip fade-in/out, cross-fade (linear, quadratic, cubic).
- Audio/MIDI clip gain/volume, normalize, export.
- Audio/MIDI track and plugin parameter automation (dynamic curves, sample&hold, linear and spline modes).
- Audio clip time-stretching (WSOLA-like or via librubberband),
pitch-shifting (via librubberband) and seamless sample-rate conversion (via libsamplerate).
- Audio/MIDI track export (mix-down, render, merge, freeze).
- Audio/MIDI metronome bar/beat clicks.
- Unlimited tempo/time-signature map.
- Unlimited location/bar markers.
- MIDI clip editor (matrix/piano roll).
- MIDI instrument definitions (a-la Cakewalk(tm) (*.ins)); SoundFont (*.sf2) and MIDI Names XML (*.midnam) files also supported.
- MIDI controller mapping/learn/assignment (mixer and plug-in parameters).
- MIDI system exclusive (SysEx) setups.
- JACK transport sync master/slave.
- JACK session support.
- NSM (Non/New Session Management) support.
- MMC control surface enabled.
- MIDI Clock, Song Position Pointer (SPP) support.
- Configurable PC-keyboard and MIDI controller shortcuts.
[read more]

item.title: NeoCat - NeoFetch Theme Pack. [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:title: NeoCat - NeoFetch Theme Pack. [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:author: m3tozz
item.itunes:summary:
NeoCat - NeoFetch Theme Pack.
(Terminal Apps)
NeoCat: NeoFetch Theme Pack.
-
Theme List: https://m3tozz.github.io/NeoCat-Themes/
Community Discord Server: https://discord.gg/sQwYCZer95
-
Installation="bash ./neocat.sh --install"
Run(Without install)="bash ./neocat.sh --shell"
Install Terminal Icons (icons-in-terminal)="bash ./install-icons.sh"
Back Up Your Own NeoFetch Configuration="bash ./neocat.sh --backup"
Download The Required Icon Pack (For Arch Linux)="git clone https://aur.archlinux.org/ttf-meslo-nerd-font-powerlevel10k.git && cd ttf-meslo-nerd-font-powerlevel10k && makepkg -si && cd .. "
-
https://www.buymeacoffee.com/m3tozz/

[read more]
item.description:
NeoCat - NeoFetch Theme Pack.
(Terminal Apps)
NeoCat: NeoFetch Theme Pack.
-
Theme List: https://m3tozz.github.io/NeoCat-Themes/
Community Discord Server: https://discord.gg/sQwYCZer95
-
Installation="bash ./neocat.sh --install"
Run(Without install)="bash ./neocat.sh --shell"
Install Terminal Icons (icons-in-terminal)="bash ./install-icons.sh"
Back Up Your Own NeoFetch Configuration="bash ./neocat.sh --backup"
Download The Required Icon Pack (For Arch Linux)="git clone https://aur.archlinux.org/ttf-meslo-nerd-font-powerlevel10k.git && cd ttf-meslo-nerd-font-powerlevel10k && makepkg -si && cd .. "
-
https://www.buymeacoffee.com/m3tozz/

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
NeoCat - NeoFetch Theme Pack.
(Terminal Apps)
NeoCat: NeoFetch Theme Pack.
-
Theme List: https://m3tozz.github.io/NeoCat-Themes/
Community Discord Server: https://discord.gg/sQwYCZer95
-
Installation="bash ./neocat.sh --install"
Run(Without install)="bash ./neocat.sh --shell"
Install Terminal Icons (icons-in-terminal)="bash ./install-icons.sh"
Back Up Your Own NeoFetch Configuration="bash ./neocat.sh --backup"
Download The Required Icon Pack (For Arch Linux)="git clone https://aur.archlinux.org/ttf-meslo-nerd-font-powerlevel10k.git && cd ttf-meslo-nerd-font-powerlevel10k && makepkg -si && cd .. "
-
https://www.buymeacoffee.com/m3tozz/

[read more]

item.title: Fingrom [Financial]
item.itunes:title: Fingrom [Financial]
item.itunes:author: vlyskouski
item.itunes:summary:
Fingrom
(Financial)
The goal of the solution is to create a financial accounting application that is intuitive, efficient, and inclusive.
That empowers users to effortlessly manage their finances while ensuring that no one is left behind.

Features:
- Accounting
- Budget Categories
- Bills, Transfers, Incomes (Invoices)
- Goals Definition
- Recurring Payments
- Exchange rates
- Metrics
- Synchronization between devices (P2P)
- Recovery via WebDav or a direct File
- Import from CSV, QIF, OFX files for Bills and Invoices
- Export to XLSX (Excel)
- Data encryption
- Localization
- Responsive and Adaptive Design
- Shortcuts

If you would like to come with suggestions, report bugs, translate the app, or contribute otherwise, feel free to reach out!

This is the "open-source code" application that welcomes and values contributions from the community. However, there are some limitations when it comes to making external modifications and distributions, as it follows the CC-BY-NC-ND-4.0 license. As the project's author, I am committed to upholding the "Terms of Use" and "Privacy Policy" to ensure the well-being and satisfaction of all users across all platforms (desktop, mobile, and web).
[read more]
item.description:
Fingrom
(Financial)
The goal of the solution is to create a financial accounting application that is intuitive, efficient, and inclusive.
That empowers users to effortlessly manage their finances while ensuring that no one is left behind.

Features:
- Accounting
- Budget Categories
- Bills, Transfers, Incomes (Invoices)
- Goals Definition
- Recurring Payments
- Exchange rates
- Metrics
- Synchronization between devices (P2P)
- Recovery via WebDav or a direct File
- Import from CSV, QIF, OFX files for Bills and Invoices
- Export to XLSX (Excel)
- Data encryption
- Localization
- Responsive and Adaptive Design
- Shortcuts

If you would like to come with suggestions, report bugs, translate the app, or contribute otherwise, feel free to reach out!

This is the "open-source code" application that welcomes and values contributions from the community. However, there are some limitations when it comes to making external modifications and distributions, as it follows the CC-BY-NC-ND-4.0 license. As the project's author, I am committed to upholding the "Terms of Use" and "Privacy Policy" to ensure the well-being and satisfaction of all users across all platforms (desktop, mobile, and web).
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Fingrom
(Financial)
The goal of the solution is to create a financial accounting application that is intuitive, efficient, and inclusive.
That empowers users to effortlessly manage their finances while ensuring that no one is left behind.

Features:
- Accounting
- Budget Categories
- Bills, Transfers, Incomes (Invoices)
- Goals Definition
- Recurring Payments
- Exchange rates
- Metrics
- Synchronization between devices (P2P)
- Recovery via WebDav or a direct File
- Import from CSV, QIF, OFX files for Bills and Invoices
- Export to XLSX (Excel)
- Data encryption
- Localization
- Responsive and Adaptive Design
- Shortcuts

If you would like to come with suggestions, report bugs, translate the app, or contribute otherwise, feel free to reach out!

This is the "open-source code" application that welcomes and values contributions from the community. However, there are some limitations when it comes to making external modifications and distributions, as it follows the CC-BY-NC-ND-4.0 license. As the project's author, I am committed to upholding the "Terms of Use" and "Privacy Policy" to ensure the well-being and satisfaction of all users across all platforms (desktop, mobile, and web).
[read more]

item.title: Filind Audio Player [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Filind Audio Player [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: ngupiware
item.itunes:summary:
Filind Audio Player
(Audioplayers)
Filind is a light free audio player application for Linux and Windows.
Shortcut :
1. Space = Play / Pause
2. Stop = end
3. Next = PageDown
4. Prev = PageUp
5. Volume Up = (=)
6. Volume Down = (-)
7. Mute = Delete

Just extract and run
[read more]
item.description:
Filind Audio Player
(Audioplayers)
Filind is a light free audio player application for Linux and Windows.
Shortcut :
1. Space = Play / Pause
2. Stop = end
3. Next = PageDown
4. Prev = PageUp
5. Volume Up = (=)
6. Volume Down = (-)
7. Mute = Delete

Just extract and run
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Filind Audio Player
(Audioplayers)
Filind is a light free audio player application for Linux and Windows.
Shortcut :
1. Space = Play / Pause
2. Stop = end
3. Next = PageDown
4. Prev = PageUp
5. Volume Up = (=)
6. Volume Down = (-)
7. Mute = Delete

Just extract and run
[read more]

item.title: Sokoban SG [Tactics & Strategy]
item.itunes:title: Sokoban SG [Tactics & Strategy]
item.itunes:author: green7
item.itunes:summary:
Sokoban SG
(Tactics & Strategy)
The classic Japanese game of Soko-Ban, features you as a warehouse keeper with an objective to efficiently push crates onto goals without trapping yourself. But watch your step! Dynamic mazes may develop that require careful forethought.
This version features an advanced user interface providing a variety of tools for developing and solving level sets:

* Pathfind Technique Solver
* In-Play Position Optimizer
* Level Limits: 50x50, 30000 moves
* Level Set Development Suite; Play/Import/Edit/Export
* Level Set File Formats; txt, sok, lvl, XSB (XSokoban), LP0 (G4B)
* Local/Remote Level Manager (sshfs, NFS, etc)
* Solution Manager; Import/Edit/Convert/Export

Customizable User Interface:
* Adjustable dockwidgets with selectable layouts
* Transparent colors/tiles/fonts/skins

Languages:
* English, French, Russian
[read more]
item.description:
Sokoban SG
(Tactics & Strategy)
The classic Japanese game of Soko-Ban, features you as a warehouse keeper with an objective to efficiently push crates onto goals without trapping yourself. But watch your step! Dynamic mazes may develop that require careful forethought.
This version features an advanced user interface providing a variety of tools for developing and solving level sets:

* Pathfind Technique Solver
* In-Play Position Optimizer
* Level Limits: 50x50, 30000 moves
* Level Set Development Suite; Play/Import/Edit/Export
* Level Set File Formats; txt, sok, lvl, XSB (XSokoban), LP0 (G4B)
* Local/Remote Level Manager (sshfs, NFS, etc)
* Solution Manager; Import/Edit/Convert/Export

Customizable User Interface:
* Adjustable dockwidgets with selectable layouts
* Transparent colors/tiles/fonts/skins

Languages:
* English, French, Russian
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Sokoban SG
(Tactics & Strategy)
The classic Japanese game of Soko-Ban, features you as a warehouse keeper with an objective to efficiently push crates onto goals without trapping yourself. But watch your step! Dynamic mazes may develop that require careful forethought.
This version features an advanced user interface providing a variety of tools for developing and solving level sets:

* Pathfind Technique Solver
* In-Play Position Optimizer
* Level Limits: 50x50, 30000 moves
* Level Set Development Suite; Play/Import/Edit/Export
* Level Set File Formats; txt, sok, lvl, XSB (XSokoban), LP0 (G4B)
* Local/Remote Level Manager (sshfs, NFS, etc)
* Solution Manager; Import/Edit/Convert/Export

Customizable User Interface:
* Adjustable dockwidgets with selectable layouts
* Transparent colors/tiles/fonts/skins

Languages:
* English, French, Russian
[read more]

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
